name: TetriMatch
short_description: TetriMatch is a matchup of two popular games combined to make something new and challenging. Test your skill in this combination of Tetris and Match 3!
detailed_description:
TetriMatch is a fresh new take on Tetris incorporating Match 3 game mechanics to add a extra layer of challenge to a classic. The player will have powerups at their disposal to help clear out blocks if things get to hectic. 

Challenges the player will face will range from increased fall speed of blocks to blocks turning to stone after a period of time. These will have to be overcome as the player tries to get a high score and survive the ever increasing difficulty! 

Mouse and Keyboard controls

  • Click and drag to move individual blocks

  • Click powerup and click on level to use it

  • WASD & Arrow Keys to move and place block shapes

  • W & Up Arrow key to rotate block shapes

  • Space Bar to save a block shape for later or use the saved block shape
